claims.summary: Verify DYNAMIC_NOISE_STEEP_GRADIENT=0.70 is a gradient threshold, not a 0.70 exploration-noise amplitude.
Verify pressure-risk and density-gradient inputs produce bounded 0.06-0.12 dynamic-noise previews without changing ESN::step.
Compare fixed exploration noise near 0.085 against current behavior for high-entropy stuckness and inhabitable foothold without deploying it.
Any intermediate gradient policy, pressure-room retune, or dynamic-noise wiring remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
